# [Update] Automated Calls

- Code: 9ad111b1
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=9ad111b1b30e4cf4a73e4d6cc2b675f4
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/7e969969385c45efb96b224272680f92?sid=918aa198-1ea9-4685-a7c5-b6a557e7330c?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true
- Duration: 0m 25s

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: So automated calls to your GBP to keep it up to date. It's something that we've actually had GBPs get suspended before
So in general we want to make sure that this is off
So we're going to click these three dots hit business profile settings
We're going to go to advanced settings and then it's right here automated calls keep your business profile up to date
We're going to go ahead and turn that off
And that's all we need to do. That's just to make sure that we don't get suspended from these automated calls

transcript_text: So automated calls to your GBP to keep it up to date. It's something that we've actually had GBPs get suspended before So in general we want to make sure that this is off So we're going to click these three dots hit business profile settings We're going to go to advanced settings and then it's right here automated calls keep your business profile up to date We're going to go ahead and turn that off And that's all we need to do. That's just to make sure that we don't get suspended from these automated calls
